events.label: assistant
events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: the wrong glue/no primer on PVC joints is a code violation (NEC 352.48 requires primed, manufacturer-listed solvent-cement joints). Decision is `fail` — conductor pull-in and concealment must halt on affected runs until defective joints are cut out, remade properly, cured, and re-inspected, while unrelated work (RMC per Art. 344, layout, supports) can continue.
